title: Ambrosia Greek Mythology Modpack
description: Ambrosia Modpack delivers an immersive, lore-rich experience with hand-picked mods like Greek Mythology Mod, Dungeons & Taverns, Voice Chat, and Sodium — featuring custom AMBROSIA branding, animated backgrounds, and themed UI elements that transform play
body:
## **Ambrosia Modpack**  First stable build for Minecraft 1.21.8 (Fabric)

Added 13 carefully-selected mods

Greek Mythology Mod • Dungeons & Taverns • Voice Chat • Sodium • Iris • Entity Culling • BetterGrassify • 3D Skin Layers • Mod Menu • Cloth Config • YACL • Placeholder API • Fabric API core

🏛️ Greek mythology experience

Custom AMBROSIA branding with animated backgrounds • Themed UI elements (Camp Half-Blood, Olympus Multiplayer) • Greek mythology mod with authentic items and features • Divine Merchant Resource Pack

⚡ Performance & visuals

Out-of-the-box FPS boost (Sodium + culling + grass & skin tweaks) • Optional shaders via Iris – works seamlessly with Sodium • Custom animated backgrounds across all menu screens

🔊 Multiplayer features

Proximity/party voice chat (Voice Chat) • Pre-configured Ambrosia Server (178.156.165.14:25565) • Server MOTD: "Welcome to Mount Olympus - Realm of the Gods"

🗺️ Gameplay extras

Procedurally-generated structures (Dungeons & Taverns) • Greek mythology items and weapons • Enhanced roleplay experience with themed locations

🔧 Tech details

Fabric Loader 0.16.14 • Custom mod modifications • Tested on client and server • Narrator disabled by default

Recommended RAM: 3 GB client / 2 GB server

Immerse yourself in the realm of the gods with this Greek mythology-themed modpack featuring custom branding, animated backgrounds, and authentic mythological content while maintaining excellent performance and stability.

All mods included adhere to their respective licenses, which can be found in their Modrinth listings.

👇 Install now and hop into the action!
